value.found_quote: Use a Private Service Connect interface with Agent Platform Runtime - Learn to configure a Private Service Connect (PSC) interface to securely connect your agent to your VPC and manage internet access.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a guide titled "Use a Private Service Connect interface with Agent Platform Runtime" that matches the claim — it allows agents to securely connect to a VPC and manage internet access via a Private Service Connect interface with Agent Platform Runtime. Additionally, the page is marked as "Preview" at the top ("This feature is subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms'"), and "Use Private Service Connect (PSC) interfaces" also appears in the left-hand navigation under Agent Runtime, confirming the offering exists but is in preview/pre-GA status.
